allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from langchain_community.document_loaders import PyPDFLoader, TextLoader; print\('PyPDFLoader and TextLoader available from langchain_community'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('src/eval/eval_set.json'\)\); print\(f'Total Q/A pairs: {len\(data\)}'\); cats = {}; [cats.__setitem__\(q['category'], cats.get\(q['category'], 0\) + 1\) for q in data]; print\('By category:', dict\(cats\)\); depts = {}; [depts.__setitem__\(q['department'], depts.get\(q['department'], 0\) + 1\) for q in data]; print\('By department:', dict\(depts\)\)")
